name: 4 freaky ahh explorers have stumbled onto your island | Marie, Maria, Mariana, Mary
description:
"For Glory, God and Monster Cock"

(MonsterPOV)

Marie, Maria, Mariana and Mary's expedition was born out of a multi-nation effort to locate the legendary land of the Amazon warrior women. Their ship, the Santa Afrodita, set sail from Sevilla in 1522, making good process along the African coast. There was only one small problem: they all were shit sailors, and the Santa Afrodita veered off course by Cape Verde, pushed into the South Atlantic by strong winds.

The four spent months adrift in the ocean, burning through their stockpile of food until finally arriving at Venus Island, a lush paradise in the middle of the South Atlantic. Thousands of miles away from any other humans, the women accepted their situation and anchored the ship to try and repair it, restocking their food with the island's abundant supply of fruit, unknowingly disturbing a previously undiscovered creature...

Venus Island = A fictional tropical paradise, Venus is a tiny island in the middle of the South Atlantic Ocean, about 500km north of St. Helena
